findings.message: skills/misc/git-guardrails-claude-code is absent from plugin.json skills array; CLAUDE.md requires every misc/ skill to be registered
skills/misc/setup-pre-commit is absent from plugin.json skills array; CLAUDE.md requires every misc/ skill to be registered
skills/misc/migrate-to-shoehorn is absent from plugin.json skills array; CLAUDE.md requires every misc/ skill to be registered
skills/misc/scaffold-exercises is absent from plugin.json skills array; CLAUDE.md requires every misc/ skill to be registered

CLAUDE.md mandates all misc/ skills be in plugin.json; all 4 misc skills are correctly listed in README.md and skills/misc/README.md but all 4 are absent from plugin.json, meaning plugin installation silently omits the entire misc bucket
"understand the relevant area" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
"Include relevant inputs, flags, or configuration" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
"Any extra observations relevant to this slice" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
"domain-relevant nouns, verbs, and concepts" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
"terms relevant for domain experts" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
"the relevant modules" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
"print or render the full relevant state" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
"inline it within the relevant decision" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
"a brief codebase summary relevant to the issue" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
"trace the relevant code" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
"all the relevant modules and callers" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
No handoff document format or section structure specified; the skill says 'write a handoff document' without defining what it should contain
"per file/hunk where relevant" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier inside the sub-agent prompt template
"Add to the appropriate settings file" — 'appropriate' is a vague quantifier; the target file is fully determined by the scope choice in step 1
Process ends abruptly at step 2a with no loop-close, commit step, or completion signal to the user
"picks the relevant skill based on the user's request" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
